---
title: "repo_spoke.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\sentinel\repo_spoke.py"
loc: 49
complexity: 4
logic_score: 7.63
style_score: 3.64
intel_score: 4.67
overall_score: 4.28
---

## Intent
The `repo_spoke.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on RepoSpoke, __init__, process. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via RepoSpoke, __init__, process. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [logging](file://logging)
- [time](file://time)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.sentinel.git_spoke](file://src.sentinel.git_spoke)
- [src.sentinel.muninn](file://src.sentinel.muninn)

### Exports
- `RepoSpoke`
- `__init__`
- `process`
